name: Claude Advisor tool
tagline: Pair Opus as advisor with Sonnet or Haiku as executor
description: Pair Opus as an advisor with Sonnet or Haiku as an executor via the Messages API, for developers building AI agents.

name: Integrations in Spine
tagline: AI that synthesize and researches info across multiple apps
description: The AI research that beats Perplexity, Claude, ChatGPT, now connected to your apps and running on a schedule. Describe a project, Spine's agents pull from your tools, browse the web, and deliver finished work. Reports, docs, spreadsheets, presentations. Set it to run daily or weekly. Results land in Notion, Google Docs, Sheets, wherever you work.

name: SoulLink
tagline: Mobile 3D Vibe Coding Partner
description: 𝐒𝐨𝐮𝐥𝐋𝐢𝐧𝐤 lets you build a cozy life with an awesome 3D AI character during the breaks of vibe coding. It is the next-gen companion app built for co-presence with best-in-class 3D visuals, novel-depth lore, emotional continuity, proactivity and long-term memory.

name: Google Finance
tagline: Ask complex finance questions, get AI-grounded answers
description: Google Finance now combines AI Deep Search, live earnings transcripts, advanced charting, and prediction market data into a single free tool for investors and market researchers globally.

name: Drift
tagline: Minimalist journal app that fades over time
description: Drift is a journal app for people who want less. 120 characters. A drawing and a photo. That's it. No streaks, no AI, no ads. Everything you write naturally softens over time. Text loses clarity. Drawings dissolve. Photos grow faint. Touch and hold to bring any entry back. Nothing is deleted — just quieter. Anchors is an anonymous shared space. A prompt appears periodically. Strangers respond side by side. No profiles, no followers.

name: Perplexity Finance
tagline: See your full financial life, bank to brokerage in one place
description: Perplexity Finance now connects your bank accounts, credit cards, and loans via Plaid; alongside your brokerage accounts. Track spending, build custom budget tools, and visualize your full net worth in one place. No setup headaches!

name: Manus Skills
tagline: Package Manus workflows into reusable agent Skills
description: Save your best Manus workflows as reusable Skills, trigger them with /SKILL_NAME, and share across your team. Built for Manus users who run recurring or multi-step agent tasks at work.

name: MiniMax CLI
tagline: Give your AI agents native multimodal capabilities
description: MMX-CLI is MiniMax’s official CLI for AI agents and terminals. It exposes text, image, video, speech, music, vision, and search through one command surface, with agent-oriented design like clean stdout, semantic exit codes, async jobs, and seamless Token Plan integration.

name: Minty
tagline: AI companion for building a clear career path
description: Minty is your AI companion for planning your career and turning it into a clear roadmap. It builds an interactive flow graph you can edit like a Miro board, simple, visual, and flexible. Big Tech, startups, content creation, whatever your path is, Minty adapts to you.

name: Avatar V by HeyGen
tagline: The most advanced AI avatar model in the world
description: Record 15 seconds. Generate yourself in any outfit, setting, or look, forever. Avatar V separates your performance from your appearance, so one clip becomes unlimited video versions without ever re-recording. Your identity stays consistent across angles and long-form video, with natural upper-body movement that doesn't look AI-generated. No camera crew. No reshoots. No starting over every time something changes. Just you, in any look, at any scale. Rated #1 Most Realistic Avatars on G2.

name: Knock data sources
tagline: Trigger event-based messaging from Stripe, Clerk, Supabase
description: Knock data sources enable you to ingest event data from any tool to trigger messaging in a few clicks—no code required. Connect pre-built sources like Stripe, Clerk, Supabase, PostHog, and WorkOS, or map any custom webhook to workflows, audiences, and user updates in a few clicks. Knock handles verification, transformation, and action mapping so you can launch lifecycle and transactional messaging faster.

name: GhostlyX
tagline: Privacy-first analytics without cookies or clutter
description: GhostlyX is a lightweight, privacy-first web analytics platform built for modern websites. No cookies, no trackers, and no invasive data collection. Just fast, reliable, and actionable insights that help you understand your traffic, measure performance, and make better decisions without compromising user privacy.

name: Waypoint-1.5
tagline: Real-time generative worlds on everyday GPUs
description: Waypoint-1.5 is Overworld’s updated real-time world model, built to run locally on consumer hardware. It improves visual quality, expands hardware support, and pushes generative worlds toward something you can actually explore and play, not just watch.

name: LayerProof Chromo
tagline: Build slides from your data, every claim backed by proof
description: LayerProof Chromo's AI agent reads your data, structures the story, builds real charts, and links every claim to its source. What took hours of copy-pasting now takes minutes. Slides you can stand behind, finally.

name: Orbit Money
tagline: Track every API and tool you pay for in one place
description: Track your subscriptions, Claude usage and AI spend in one place. Find better deals on your existing plans; get pinged before next charge hits. Free beta available now.

name: Crowdcast 3.0
tagline: Run every type of event without switching tools
description: We’ve rebuilt Crowdcast. Now you can run workshops, webinars, and livestreams—all in one place, without switching tools. Host interactive sessions with people on screen, scale to thousands in the audience, and bring participants on stage instantly. Use the rebuilt stage to switch between video, slides, and media seamlessly. Run every event on one platform.

name: WM Studio
tagline: Craft campaign ready content with a digital twin
description: Create stunning images and videos instantly no skills required. From raw idea to production-ready assets, generate, edit, and polish pro visuals in just a few clicks. How? Automode does the heavy lifting: Describe what you need in simple way (e.g., "F1 race car exploding in neon city"), and our smart engine crafts the perfect, ready-to-use content. Perfect for entrepreneurs, marketers, and creators building reels, ads, or social content.

name: Matcha
tagline: The First Open Source IPad Note Taking App
description: The all-in-one AI-powered note taking app for students and professionals, completely open sourced.

name: Audos 2.0
tagline: Run 10 AI businesses at once
description: Audos 2.0 lets you go from a business idea to paying customers on autopilot. Portfolio mode - run 5, 10 ideas at the same time. Stop betting everything on one. Test fast, double down on winners. Collaboration - pull anyone into any project. A friend, an advisor, a potential co-founder. Build together, not alone. Top up with $1. We invest up to $50 in your idea. Comment yours below, and we'll fast-track you for a $100K equity-free publishing deal.

name: Viktor Skills Marketplace
tagline: Install ready-made skills for your AI coworker
description: Viktor is the AI coworker in Slack. With the new Skills Marketplace, you can add expert-built Google Ads and Meta Ads knowledge to Viktor. Then ask normal questions about campaign performance and Viktor uses those playbooks in the background to diagnose spikes, explain the evidence, and draft next actions for approval.

tagline: Pair Opus as advisor with Sonnet or Haiku as executor
description: Pair Opus as an advisor with Sonnet or Haiku as an executor via the Messages API, for developers building AI agents.
